calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brilliant, Esq. for Plaintiff
Bruce Sandifer, General Manager for Plaintiff, Gerda Kircher
Uluc Turan in propria persona

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. The parties placed a stipulated judgment on the record as follows:
Possession to the Plaintiff of the premises located at 1105 Larkin St. #209, SF, CA
Clerk of the court will issue a Writ of Possession for the Sheriif to remove the Defendant from the premises.
The Rental Agreement is forfeited.
Each party to bear their own costs.
Defendant waives all claims against the Plaintiff
Plaintiff is the prevailing party.
Defendant will vacate the said premises on 2/1/04 by noon.
If Defendant vacates by noon 2/1/04, Plaintiff will further stipulate to set aside the stipulated judgment.
Dismissal papers shall be prepared by the Defendant.
Plaintiff will waive rent if Defendant vacates by noon 2/1/04.
See scanned document.

JPT: Irving Pfeffer Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: JoAnn Bryce (504A)
